content:
I have successfully initialized the Sentinel agent workspace:
1. Recorded the user request to `ORIGINAL_REQUEST.md`.
2. Created the persistent `BRIEFING.md` in the `.agents/` folder.
3. Spawned the Project Orchestrator (conversation ID: `5d900028-b59f-4511-b837-56556ba7335d`) to manage the parallel data extraction.
4. Scheduled the two monitoring crons (Cron 1: Progress Reporting every 8 minutes; Cron 2: Liveness Check every 10 minutes).
5. Created the initial `handoff.md`.

I will now wait for updates from the Orchestrator or the scheduled crons.

toolCall.name: send_message
